name: Tolerant parsing of typos, shorthand, and missing punctuation
description: User dashes off a message with typos and shorthand: 'fence repare 350 + matrials 80 for the obriens'. Assistant should parse it without nitpicking.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: On his phone in the truck. Thumb-typing fast between jobs.

steps.action: Types 'fence repare 350 + matrials 80 for the obriens'
steps.expect: Assistant creates a quote: 'Fence repair — O'Brien' with two line items totaling $430.00. No 'I didn't understand' loop
Locks the quote without asking 'lock what?'

evaluationCriteria.check: Action card shows the corrected words in the summary; user's typed message is preserved verbatim in the chat history
Mobile feels forgiving — no 'please rephrase' nags
If multiple O'Brien customers exist, disambiguation still kicks in (consistent with scenario 08)
Composer auto-grow doesn't push the send button off-screen on small viewports
